Hero.description: We build intelligent solutions at the intersection of <ai>AI & ML</ai>, <cloud>Cloud Architecture</cloud>, <software>Custom Software</software>, and <data>Data Analytics</data>. Focused on AI and Quantum technologies — turning research into real-world impact.

header.description: Five core technology domains we master to deliver practical, cutting-edge solutions for businesses ready to embrace AI and Quantum.

agi.label: 01 — AI
agi.title: AI & Machine Learning
agi.description: Deep learning, NLP, and computer vision models tailored to your business. From predictive analytics to intelligent automation — we turn data into decisions.

quantum.label: 02 — QUANTUM
quantum.title: Quantum Computing & PQC
quantum.description: Quantum algorithm research, post-quantum cryptography (PQC), and quantum-safe migration strategies. Preparing your systems for the quantum era.

cloud.label: 03 — CLOUD
cloud.title: Cloud Native Architecture
cloud.description: Kubernetes orchestration, microservices, and serverless design. We build infrastructure that scales with your growth while keeping costs lean.

data.label: 04 — DATA
data.title: Data Engineering & Analytics
data.description: End-to-end data pipelines, real-time streaming, and interactive dashboards. Transforming raw data into actionable business intelligence.

security.label: 05 — SECURITY
security.title: Cybersecurity & Compliance
security.description: Zero-trust architecture, quantum-safe encryption, and automated threat detection. Security built into every layer from day one.

header.description: End-to-end technology services that accelerate innovation, optimize operations, and create measurable business impact.

aiml.title: AI & Machine Learning
aiml.description: Intelligent automation, predictive analytics, and natural language processing solutions that transform raw data into strategic business advantage.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.description: Multi-cloud, serverless, and Kubernetes orchestration strategies. We design infrastructure that scales efficiently while optimizing cost.

software.title: Custom Software Development
software.description: Full-stack engineering with microservices, event-driven architectures, and real-time systems. Built to perform and scale with your needs.

data.title: Data Analytics & BI
data.description: End-to-end data pipelines, interactive dashboards, and decision intelligence platforms that turn complexity into clarity.

strategy.title: Digital Strategy Consulting
strategy.description: Technology roadmapping, process optimization, and organizational change management for businesses navigating digital transformation.

security.title: Cybersecurity & Compliance
security.description: Zero-trust architecture, automated threat detection, and comprehensive compliance frameworks built into every layer of your platform.

header.description: Real projects. Measurable impact. We deliver solutions that make a tangible difference for our clients.

fintech.title: Payment Processing Modernization
fintech.description: Rebuilt a legacy payment gateway into a microservices architecture handling 500K+ daily transactions with sub-200ms latency on Kubernetes.

healthcare.title: AI-Powered Diagnostic Assistant
healthcare.description: Developed a deep learning platform for medical image analysis with 95.8% accuracy, integrated with EHR systems across 15+ healthcare facilities.

ecommerce.title: Smart Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: End-to-end digital transformation for a mid-size retail platform. Real-time inventory, AI-driven recommendations, and omnichannel integration serving 200K+ monthly users.

header.description: We believe in learning by building. Our open-source projects explore cryptography, quantum computing, and post-quantum security.

cryptoTimeline.title: Crypto Timeline
cryptoTimeline.description: An interactive visual timeline tracing the history of cryptography — from ancient ciphers to modern quantum-resistant algorithms.

pqcPlayground.title: PQC Playground
pqcPlayground.description: A hands-on interactive platform to explore Post-Quantum Cryptography algorithms. Compare, test, and understand the future of encryption.

whyQuantumBreaksRSA.title: Why Quantum Breaks RSA
whyQuantumBreaksRSA.description: A visual, step-by-step explanation of how quantum computers threaten RSA encryption using Shor's algorithm.

t1.quote: TechBI delivered exactly what we needed — a modern payment system that handles our growing transaction volume without breaking a sweat. Their engineering team is sharp and responsive.
t1.author: Sarah Chen

t2.quote: Working with TechBI felt like extending our own team. Their AI diagnostic platform reduced our reporting cycle from weeks to hours, and they understood healthcare compliance from day one.
t2.author: Dr. Marcus Rivera

t3.quote: From strategy to execution, TechBI is the real deal. They modernized our entire infrastructure — cloud migration, microservices, real-time analytics — all delivered on schedule.
t3.author: James Whitfield

CTA.description: Let's build something extraordinary together. From strategy to deployment, we're your end-to-end technology partner.

Footer.description: A technology company specializing in AI and Quantum computing. We build intelligent solutions that bridge cutting-edge research and real business value.

c1.title: The Conscious Cloud
c1.teaser: Distributed AGI instances that share a unified self-awareness across global compute nodes. Consciousness as infrastructure.

c2.title: Quantum Memory Fabric
c2.teaser: Storing petabytes inside individual molecules. Cold-atom arrays that retain data for centuries without power.

c3.title: Neural Sovereignty
c3.teaser: The legal and technical framework for owning your own neural data. End-to-end encrypted thought. Inalienable cognitive rights.

c4.title: Morphic Interfaces
c4.teaser: UIs that reshape themselves in real time based on biometric signals, context, and predictive intent modelling.

c5.title: Synthetic Ecosystems
c5.teaser: Procedurally grown digital environments that follow emergent evolutionary rules. Ecosystems that outlive their creators.

c6.title: Zero-Latency Civilisation
c6.teaser: Planetary communication networks built on entangled photon pairs. Information that arrives before it is sent.

c7.title: The Post-Scarcity Stack
c7.teaser: Open-source molecular manufacturing protocols. When any device can print any material, scarcity becomes a policy choice.
